name: WMCH Global Investment Limited
summary: WMCH Global Investment Limited, an investment holding company, provides civil and structural engineering consultancy services to infrastructural, residential, industrial, commercial, and institutional projects in Singapore, Vietnam, and internationally. The company offers master planning, structural due diligence, and visual inspection services to existing buildings. It also provides geotechnical engineering consultancy services. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in North Point, Hong Kong. WMCH Global Investment Limited is a subsidiary of WMCH Global Holdings Limited.
